title: Cavity Prevention Measures * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Cavity Prevention Measures * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Older Adults Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DENTAL PROGRAM DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental care to people living with HIV. Clinic services include preventative care, restorative care, dentures, and bridge work. For clients that need to travel to access services, transportation and travel lodging may be available. 2460 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: People living with HIV who are enrolled in HIV Alliance Care Coordination services Hours: Call for information Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE DENTAL PROGRAM
